issues.description: FlipLife is incorrect for this effect. The card effect allows you to look at and rearrange Life cards, placing 1 on top of deck and returning the rest to Life area. This requires SearchDeck or a custom rearrangement action, not FlipLife (which typically flips Life to hand). The action should represent selective deck placement and Life area reordering, which FlipLife does not capture.

The DSL is missing the Rush keyword entirely. The card text explicitly states '[Rush] (This card can attack on the turn in which it is played.)' which must be represented as a separate keyword or effect.
